cards.name: Bold Leadership
abilities: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each Hero Class you have.

cards.name: Secret Avengers Assemble!
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each [rule:Sidekick] and other [team:avengers] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Freedom Never Dies
abilities: Whenever you play a [rule:Sidekick] or another [team:avengers] Hero this turn set that card aside. At the end of your turn, put those cards on the bottom of your deck in random order before you draw your new hand.

cards.name: Below
abilities: You get +3[icon:recruit] usable only to recruit Heroes in the HQ space under the Sewers.

cards.name: Rapid Reinforcements

cards.name: Authoritarian Iron Man
abilities: Always Leads: Superhuman Registration Act

Master Strike: Authoritarian Iron Man [keyword:fortifies] the next city space to his right, starting with the Bridge. You can't fight him while there's a Villain in that space. Villains in that space get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Armada of Armors
abilities: Fight: You get +6[icon:recruit] usable only to recruit [hc:ranged] and/or [hc:tech] Heroes.

cards.name: Freeze Domestic Assets
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discards all their cards with [icon:recruit] icons.

cards.name: Man the Fortifications
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, it enters the city space that Authoritarian Iron Man is fortifying.

cards.name: Recall to Service
abilities: Fight: The Villain with the highest printed [icon:attack] in the Escape Pile enters the city space that Authoritarian Iron Man is fortifying.

cards.name: Baron Helmut Zemo
abilities: Baron Zemo gets -1[icon:attack] for each Villain in your Victory Pile.
Always Leads: Thunderbolts
Master Strike: Each player KOs a Villain from their Victory Pile. Any player who cannot do so gains a Wound.

cards.name: Revenge for My Father

Always Leads: S.H.I.E.L.D. Elite
Master Strike: Two S.H.I.E.L.D. Officers enter the city as 3[icon:attack] Villains. When you fight them, gain them as Heroes.

cards.name: Crash the Helicarrier

abilities: Fight: Each other player discards two cards, and then draws a card.

Escape: Each player swaps their hand with the top four cards of their deck.

Escape: [keyword:Fortify] the S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer stack. While it's fortified, whenever any number of S.H.I.E.L.D. Officers become Villains, an extra one becomes a Villain.

cards.name: Iron Spider
abilities: Ambush: [keyword:Fortify] your deck. While Iron Spider fortifies a players deck, that player draws one fewer card at the end of their turn.
Fight: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If that card is worth 2VP or less, Iron Spider fortifies the deck of the player on your left.

cards.name: Ms. Marvel
abilities: Escape: [keyword:Fortify] an HQ space. While its fortified, Heroes can't be gained from that space.

cards.name: She-Hulk
abilities: [keyword:Size-Changing]: [hc:strength]
Escape: [keyword:Fortify] the Villain deck. When a Master Strike is completed from that deck, each player gains a Wound and She-Hulk enters the Sewers.

cards.name: Yellowjacket
abilities: [keyword:Size-Changing]: [hc:tech]
Escape: [keyword:Fortify] the Hero Deck. While it's fortified, whenever a Hero in the HQ costs 7 or more, KO that Hero.

cards.name: Fixer

cards.name: Mach-IV

cards.name: Radioactive Man
abilities: Escape: [keyword:Fortify] the Wound Stack. While it's fortified, whenever a player gains a Wound, that player gains an extra Wound.

cards.name: Songbird

Escape: Same effect.

henchmen.name: Mandroid
abilities: This gets +1[icon:attack] for each other Mandroid in your Victory Pile.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

henchmen.name: Cape-Killers
abilities: [keyword:S.H.I.E.L.D. Clearance]
Fight: KO a card from your discard pile.
Setup: 9 Twists. Hero Deck has 3 Heroes of one Team and 3 Heroes of another Team. ([team:avengers],[team:x-men],[team:spider-friends],[team:marvel-knights], etc.)
Twist 1-7: Each player reveals their hand. Each player that has cards of both those teams gains a Wound.
Twist 8: Evil wins!
Setup: 7 Twists.

Twist: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme. Then, for each Twist in that stack, put a S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer next to the Mastermind as a 3[icon:attack] Villain with [keyword:S.H.I.E.L.D. Clearance]. You can fight them to gain them as Heroes.
Evil Wins: When there are 7 Officers next to the Mastermind.
Setup: 1 player: 4 Heroes in Hero Deck. 1-3 players: 9 Twists. 4-5 players: 6 Twists.
Twist: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme. Then, for each Twist in that stack, KO a Hero from the HQ and immediately refill that HQ space.
Evil Wins: When the Hero Deck runs out.
Setup: 11 Twists.
Twist 1, 3, 5, 7, 9: This Scheme [keyword:fortifies ] the city space to its right starting with the Bridge. Villains in that space get +1[icon:attack].
Other Twists: If there's a Villain in that fortified city space, KO a Bystander.
Evil Wins: When 3 Bystanders are in the KO pile and/or Escape Pile.
Setup: 8 Twists.
Twist: KO all Bystanders held by Villains. Then, the Villain with the highest [icon:attack] captures 3 Bystanders.
Evil Wins: When 15 Bystanders are in the KO pile and/or Escape Pile.
Setup: 6 Twists. Add an extra Villain Group.
Twist: Reveal the top 3 cards of the Villain Deck. Play each Villain you revealed. Put the rest back in any order.
Evil Wins: When there are 2 Villains per player in the Escape Pile.
Setup: 6 Twists. 7 Heroes in Hero Deck.

Twist: Put a Hero from the HQ next to the Scheme as an “Unmasked“ Hero. All cards with “Unmasked“ Hero Names cost +1[icon:recruit] to recruit. You can't Unmask a Hero Name that has already been Unmasked.
Evil Wins: When 5 Heroes are Unmasked.

schemes.name: United States Split by Civil War

abilities: Setup: 10 Twists.

Twist: If there is a Villain on the Streets or Bridge, put this Twist in a stack of “Western States Victories.“ Otherwise, if there is a Villain in the Sewers, put this Twist in a stack of “Eastern States Victories.“
Evil Wins: When there are 3 Western Victories or 3 Eastern Victories.
When you rescue this Bystander, gain a [rule:Sidekick].
When you rescue this Bystander, reveal the top three cards of the Hero Deck. The player of your choice gains one of them that costs 3 or less. Put the rest back in any order.
